description: Use this API to return an array of integer values for subsystem FACTS device buses. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, iarray = afactsbusint(sid, ties, flag, fcttyp, entry, string)
python_syntax: ierr, iarray = afactsbusint(sid, ties, flag, fcttyp, entry, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem buses connected to facts devices with a series element to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem facts devices to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: fcttyp
parameters.description: A flag indicating which types of facts devices to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: A flag indicating organization. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the FACTS device quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: iarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for each end of interior subsystem FACTS devices only.
for the subsystem bus end of tie FACTS devices only.
for the non-subsystem bus end of tie FACTS devices only.
for each end of tie FACTS devices only.
for each end of interior subsystem FACTS devices and the subsystem bus end of tie FACTS devices.
for each end of interior subsystem FACTS devices and tie FACTS devices.

flag.description: for both in-service and out-of-service FACTS devices.

fcttyp.description: for only FACTS devices without a series element.
for only FACTS devices with a series element.
for both types of FACTS devices.

string.description: Bus number of this FACTS bus.
Bus number of the other end FACTS bus.
FACTS device end code of this FACTS bus: 1 (sending end bus) or 2 (terminal end bus).
Control mode (negative if blocked during solution).
Terminal end voltage condition code: -1 (holding low limit), 0 (in range), or 1 (holding high limit).
Series voltage limit code: 0 (in range), or 1 (holding high limit).
Bridge active power transfer limit code: 0 (in range), or 1 (holding high limit).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of IARRAY, is not large enough.
